Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to craft a DuckDB SQL query that 1 Filters out cases with more than 6 events 2 Returns only events from cases with 6 or fewer events

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First I need to count events per case_id Then filter to keep only case_ids with count less than or equal to 6 Finally return all events for those filtered case_ids

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: This is a classic use case for a subquery or CTE

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Alternatively I could use a CTE

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Both approaches should work The subquery approach is more concise while the CTE approach might be more readable
